title: Chart accessibility stress report
summary: The chart contract is usable only when the takeaway, source, alt text, and data table remain visible.

intent.primaryQuestion: Can a reader audit the chart without hover, scripts, or color-only meaning?
intent.decision: Accept the chart contract when the table fallback and evidence links are present.
successCriteria: The chart has a written takeaway.
The underlying values are available as a table.
The source and evidence are reachable from the chart and claim.

claims.statement: Bounded charts can improve scan speed without replacing precise data.
knownLimits: Only small explanatory chart types are supported.

sections.title: Review conclusion
sections.content: ## Conclusion - **Accept the bounded chart path** when every visual includes a source, alt text, and table fallback. - Unsafe input like must stay inert.

chart.title: Validation coverage by contract area
chart.takeaway: Intent, claims, charts, and trust boundaries all have deterministic checks.
chart.altText: Bar chart showing deterministic checks for intent, claims, charts, and trust boundaries.

items.title: Keyboard controls
items.body: Filters and copy buttons keep labels and focus-visible styling.

items.title: Color is not the only signal
items.body: Each bar includes a text label, numeric value, and state label.

verification.label: Chart fallback
verification.detail: The chart includes a table fallback and source metadata.

nextActions: Run validate-html-report.mjs with --require-browser when browser support is available.
